hero.title: Find out why your job application got rejected
hero.subtitle: Upload your CV. In under a minute, get a full breakdown: ATS simulation, skill gap radar, CV rewrite, and an AI mock interview. Tailored to the exact job.
hero.noDataStored: No account required · No data stored

sections.diagnosticTitle: A full {hl}diagnostic{/hl}, not just a score.
sections.beyondTitle: Your CV is only {hl}half{/hl} the story.
sections.beyondDesc: Recruiters Google you. We audit your GitHub and LinkedIn before they do, and flag everything that could cost you the interview.
sections.fixTitle: {hl}Fix the problem{/hl}, not just read about it.
sections.bridgeDesc: AI generates a custom project engineered to close your exact skill gaps, with architecture, stack, and success criteria ready to add to your CV.
sections.coverTitle: A letter that sounds like you, written to land the role.
sections.coverDesc: Generated from your CV, the job description, and your signal audit. Not a template. Tailored to the exact company and role.
sections.coverPremiumNote: Full letter generated with Premium, tailored per company and role
sections.bridgePremiumNote: Full project roadmap, actionable steps & recruiter tip unlocked with Premium

radar.title: Technical Skills Radar
radar.subtitle: Mapped against the job description requirements
redFlagItems: No quantified impact on any bullet

issues.label: Pinned repos have no README
issues.detail: 3 pinned repositories lack documentation. Strong negative signal for senior roles.

issues.label: No CI/CD configuration detected
issues.detail: None of your repos include GitHub Actions or similar pipelines.

issues.label: Commit history gaps > 6 months
issues.detail: 3 visible gaps suggest inconsistent activity over the last 2 years.

issues.label: Zero recommendations received
issues.detail: No peer or manager recommendations. At senior level, social proof matters.

issues.label: Current role title too vague
issues.detail: "Developer" without seniority or domain signals. Recruiters can't assess fit at a glance.

issues.label: Summary section missing
issues.detail: Profile has no About section. You're losing the most prominent keyword-matching surface.

atsCard.label: ATS Filter
atsCard.title: Simulate the filter before the recruiter does
atsCard.desc: We run your CV through an ATS simulation matched to the job description. Each missing keyword gets a point value, so you know exactly what to add.

rewriteCard.label: Improve CV
rewriteCard.title: Your CV, surgically rewritten
rewriteCard.desc: One click rewrites the entire CV: keywords injected, passive tone converted, seniority signals added. Export a clean PDF.
rewriteCard.beforeText: "Responsible for backend development and worked on API features for the platform."
rewriteCard.afterText: Led backend architecture delivering 4 core REST APIs, reducing P95 latency by 40% across 200K daily requests.

interviewCard.label: AI Interview
interviewCard.title: 10-minute voice mock interview
interviewCard.desc: A real-time AI interviewer, voice-based and role-specific. Ends with a scored debrief across communication, technical depth, and leadership signals.
interviewCard.aiQuestion: "Walk me through a system you designed from scratch. What trade-offs did you make?"
interviewCard.youAnswer: "I built a real-time notification service handling 50K events/sec..."

bridge.projectDesc: Build a production-ready microservices system using Docker, Kubernetes, and an event-driven architecture via Kafka. Exposes real-world CI/CD pipeline experience and closes the DevOps gap identified in your radar.
bridge.architectureText: API Gateway → Auth Service → Order Service → Kafka → Notification Service + Inventory Service. Each service containerised with Docker, orchestrated via Kubernetes, deployed via GitHub Actions.
whatToBuild: API Gateway with JWT auth, rate limiting, and request routing
Kafka producer/consumer for async inter-service communication
CI/CD pipeline with automated Docker builds and K8s deployments
Distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry and Prometheus metrics
Zero-downtime rolling deploy strategy with health checks

coverLetter.headerLabel: Cover Letter · Senior Backend Engineer @ Stripe
coverLetter.p1: I'm applying for the Senior Backend Engineer role with a focus on distributed systems, an area where I've spent the last four years building high-throughput, event-driven infrastructure. At my current company, I led the redesign of our payments pipeline, reducing P99 latency from 340ms to 62ms across 800K daily transactions.
coverLetter.p2: What draws me to Stripe is the engineering culture around reliability and API design. Your recent engineering blog post on idempotency keys resonated with a problem I solved last year when we migrated from a monolith to microservices, ensuring exactly-once delivery across a Kafka-backed system with 15 consumers.
coverLetter.p3: I'd welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience with...

radar.desc: Technical stack match vs. position requirements. Instantly see what you have, what you're missing, and by how much.

whatYouGet.title: Beyond the CV
whatYouGet.subtitle: Most tools stop at keywords. RejectCheck reads signals from every layer of your professional presence.

github.title: GitHub Signal
github.desc: Commit cadence, language diversity, open source contributions — what your CV doesn't say about your real technical depth.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn Signal
linkedin.desc: Cross-reference your CV against your LinkedIn profile. Consistency gaps, missing endorsements, and profile completeness.

redFlags.title: Red Flags
redFlags.desc: Behavioral signals experienced recruiters notice and rarely mention: unexplained gaps, scope creep, tone inconsistencies.

roadmap.title: Action Roadmap
roadmap.desc: Every issue from every signal, prioritized by impact. Critical items first — the ones that get CVs binned before they're read.

cta.title: Stop guessing. Start fixing.
cta.subtitle: One free scan. No account required.

leftStep1.title: Your application
leftStep1.description: CV and job listing are inseparable. One without the other, the analysis can't target.
leftStep1.hintBody: Title, stack, responsibilities, nice-to-haves — every line affects the ATS score.

leftStep2.title: Signals
leftStep2.description: Each additional signal sharpens the diagnosis. GitHub reveals what the CV doesn't say. LinkedIn confirms consistency.
leftStep2.hintBody: Skip this step if you want. You can analyze with CV + listing only.

leftStep3.title: All set
leftStep3.description: Analysis takes ~45 seconds. Score, skills radar, ATS simulation, CV rewrite.

jobListing.label: Job listing
jobListing.hint: The more complete, the more precise the diagnosis.

warnings.tooShort: Job description seems too short for a reliable analysis
warnings.invalidContent: This doesn't look like a job description
warnings.invertedFields: This looks like a CV, not a job description

technicalRadar.label: Skill Mapping
technicalRadar.title: Skill Gap Analysis
technicalRadar.subtitle: Your current level vs. what the job requires, measured across each key skill.
technicalRadar.noGaps: No specific gaps identified for this level.

anonymousCta.title: Don't lose your analysis
anonymousCta.desc: Sign up now to save this result and track your progress. Unregistered analyses are not saved and will be lost.

atsTab.atsExplanation: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) — software that filters CVs before a human reads them. It scans for keywords matching the job description. A low score means your CV may never reach a recruiter.
atsTab.keywordGapSubtitle: Check keywords you can realistically add to your CV — your ATS score updates in real time.

cvAnalysisTab.profileSubtitle: Seniority positioning, writing tone, and behavioral signals extracted from your CV.
cvAnalysisTab.senioritySubtitle: Expected seniority for this role vs. the level your CV actually signals.
cvAnalysisTab.toneSubtitle: Active vs. passive voice patterns across your bullet points and descriptions.
cvAnalysisTab.cvIssuesSubtitle: {count} vulnerabilit{plural} identified across structure, content, and positioning.

flagsTab.recruiterIntuitionSubtitle: {count} behavioral flag{plural} that experienced recruiters notice and rarely mention.
flagsTab.technicalSubtitle: Required skills from the job description matched against your CV.

signalsTab.githubEmpty: No GitHub username provided — deep technical verification skipped.
signalsTab.githubCta: Re-analyze with your GitHub username to unlock signal
signalsTab.linkedinEmpty: No LinkedIn PDF provided — cross-reference verification skipped.
signalsTab.linkedinCta: Export your LinkedIn PDF (Settings → Data Privacy → Get a copy) and re-analyze

roadmapTab.actionPlanSubtitle: Every gap from your analysis, prioritized. Critical items are the ones that get CVs rejected before a human reads them.

noIssues.title: No Issues Found
noIssues.desc: Your application materials are already in top shape.

critical.label: Critical
critical.desc: get you binned before a human reads your CV

minor.label: Minor
minor.desc: polish once the above are done

improveTab.premiumDesc: Based on every issue found in this analysis, AI surgically rewrites your CV — injecting missing keywords, fixing passive tone, and adding seniority signals. Download the result as a formatted PDF.
improveTab.pdfNote: The PDF is formatted as a standard CV. Open it in any PDF viewer or send it directly to recruiters.
improveTab.cvFixedSubtitle: Surgical rewrites based on what this scan actually found

fixes.text: **Missing ATS keywords** injected naturally into your existing content. No keyword dumping.
**Seniority signals** added. Scope, ownership, and impact language where the scan flagged gaps.
**CV audit issues** addressed. Structure and clarity fixes on the flagged sections only.

improveTab.noFabrication: Nothing is fabricated. Every change traces back to a specific problem found in this scan. Your voice stays intact.
improveTab.signInRequired: Sign in to enable CV rewriting.

interviewTab.premiumDesc: A 10-minute AI voice interview tailored to this specific job, based on the gaps and red flags from your analysis. Get a full performance report after.
interviewTab.noAttemptDesc: Select a past attempt on the left to view its analysis, or start a new interview.
interviewTab.noInterviewsYet: No interviews yet. Start your first session above.
